case_title: TJOMB, MANFROY VS BRYANT, PATRICIA MRS.

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, PATRICIA MRS. HEARING SET FOR OCT-17-1994 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, PATRICIA MRS. HEARING SET FOR DEC-06-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: SEP-28-1994 AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, PATRICIA MRS.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TJOMB, MANFROY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRYANT, PATRICIA MRS. $2,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,189.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-31-1994, NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, PATRICIA MRS.
